name: Get Bank Turn Down by Zip Codes

content.query:
/* Non Rite */

SELECT
job.Division
,cst.Zip
,jsc.JobStatusCategory
,dsp.Disposition
,sum(job.GrossAmount) as GrossAmount
,count(lds.LeadID) as LeadCount
 FROM 
 [EDW].[FACT_JOB] job
,[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
,[EDW].[DIM_DISPOSITION] dsp
 ,EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS js
 ,EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS_CATEGORY jsc
 ,[EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
 where 
 job.JobStatusID = js.JobStatusID
 and js.JobStatusCategoryID = jsc.JobStatusCategoryID
 and job.LeadID = lds.LeadID
 and lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
 and lds.DispositionID = dsp.DispositionID
 and lds.EntryDate between '2022-12-01' and '2023-02-28'
 and job.Division not in ('RTW')
group by
job.Division
,cst.Zip
,jsc.JobStatusCategory
,dsp.Disposition


/* For Rite */

SELECT
lds.Division
,cst.Zip
,'NA' as JobStatusCategory
,dsp.Disposition
,sum(lds.GrossSalesAmount) as GrossAmount
,count(lds.LeadID) as LeadCount
 FROM 
[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
,[EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
,[EDW].[DIM_DISPOSITION] dsp
 where 
lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
 and lds.DispositionID = dsp.DispositionID
 and lds.EntryDate between '2022-12-01' and '2023-02-28'
 and lds.Division in ('RTW')
group by
lds.Division
,cst.Zip
,dsp.Disposition
